name: python3-responses
title: python3-responses
summary: Utility library for mocking out the requests Python 3 library
description:
Utility library for mocking out the requests Python 3 library
responses is a module used to mock out the `requests' Python 3 library in
order to perform unit tests.
.
This package provides the Python 3 module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-responses because Utility library for mocking out the requests Python 3 library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-responses as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-responses with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-responses --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
